name: Peachy Ice Cream Crown Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a 9-inch springform pan with plastic wrap.
2. Arrange ladyfingers to cover the bottom and sides of the pan.
3. Layer half of the ice cream, remaining ladyfingers, and then the remaining ice cream into the pan.
4. Freeze the layered cake mixture.
5. In a saucepan, combine sugar and cornstarch; stir in wine and water.
6. Cook over medium heat until the mixture is clear and slightly thickened.
7. Mash one peach and stir it into the wine mix.
8. Cool the peach mixture.
9. Place peach slices over the ice cream layer of the cake.
10. Serve with the wine sauce.
